global_objective: Audit and remediate the /gain slash command and the shell-output minimizer pipeline in the omp (oh-my-pi) fork. Apply RTK-style aggressive filtering, surface diagnostic state, ship as one PR squash-merged to main.

ralplan consensus for gain-slash-remediation completed (rev 3 APPROVE Architect + Critic ratified)
ralplan consensus for minimizer-filter-remediation completed (rev 2; M1/M2/M3 + m4-m7 fixes applied inline during execution)
Phase 1: FFI kill-switch field — MinimizerOptions.legacy_filters Option<bool>, MinimizerConfig.legacy_filters_active bool, napi binding, index.d.ts regenerated (commit e727150f7)

Phase 3: Tier 2a RTK pytest state machine port + normalize_uv_form covering all 7 invocation forms (commit 9482a4b44)

Phase 7: chain decomposer FFI resolution — engine::apply routes CommandPlan::Chain via filters::dispatch (chain-git / chain-first labels) without FFI surface change (commit 981e64f99)

PR #4 opened against GratefulDave/oh-my-pi main and squash-merged as 246f4a5dc
Local main pulled to 246f4a5dc; local feature branches deleted

current_issues: Stashed: Cargo.lock + .omc/ state files post-merge (stash entry 'cargo-lock + omc state pre-pull') — drop or apply if needed; not load-bearing

constraints: User rule: 'remember u or implementing **ALL** changs. When you implement you will commit uncommitted changes on this branch. You will the start a new branch or worktree. You will test to make sure all changes were succesfully implemented' — implement EVERY plan item, commit prior WIP, branch, run end-to-end tests
User rule: 'I fucking told u not to focus on gain and focus on the fucking filters!' — filter work takes priority over gain work when scope is contested
User stack: TSX, Python, Rust, Go primarily — deprioritize Ruby/.NET/CPP filter work
License compat: workspace MIT × RTK MIT verified; direct port allowed with attribution header per ported file + ATTRIBUTION-RTK.md listing pinned SHA
Kill-switch design: MinimizerOptions.legacy_filters Option<bool> mirrors ai_smart_enabled precedent at config.rs:67 — no env-only LazyLock (avoids cargo test parallel races)
FFI rule: additive optional fields OK (precedent ai_smart_enabled); avoid breaking changes to ShellMinimizerApplyOptions
JSONL record shape (MinimizerGainRecord) has no input text — replay benchmarks use synthetic fixture corpus instead
Gain diagnostic does NOT auto-detect kill-switch state — operators must check OMP_MINIMIZER_LEGACY_FILTERS env first when investigating low gain

Mode α confirmed: applyShellMinimizer napi entry routes CommandPlan::Chain through engine::apply whole-buffer path only; segmented runner in shell.rs:627-714 reached only via Shell::run, not JS FFI. Resolved without FFI surface change by routing Chain plans through filters::dispatch in engine::apply.

Real-data R2 evidence: TS/Go tools (vitest/tsc/eslint/biome/jest/go/golangci-lint) had ZERO misses in 7d corpus. rustfmt 0.23 MB, cargo 0.18 MB, xxd 0.04 MB, strings 0.04 MB. Tier 3 rustfmt/xxd justified; cargo audit no-op'd.
